purpose: Internal reviewed source registry for Panchang, Vedic guidance, festival rules, numerology, and palmistry modules.
public_output_rule: No Panchang, Vedic guidance, festival, numerology, palmistry, or planetary interpretation should be publicly displayed unless it is backed by an approved source/method record and passes knowledge preflight.

source_classes.label: Traditional Text / Shastra
source_classes.description: Classical or traditional textual source requiring careful review and method mapping before public use.

source_classes.label: Calculation Method
source_classes.description: Mathematical or astronomical calculation rule used for Panchang and planetary positions.

source_classes.label: Regional Practice
source_classes.description: Region-specific festival, vrata, or observance rule.

source_classes.label: Reviewed Interpretation
source_classes.description: Curated Drishvara interpretation based on reviewed traditional rules.

sources.title: Classical Panchang calculation methods
sources.notes: Placeholder source family. Must be expanded with reviewed method notes before calculation outputs are shown publicly.

sources.title: Regional festival and vrata rule registry
sources.notes: Placeholder registry for festival rules. Regional applicability and observance basis must be documented before public use.

sources.title: Drishvara numerology interpretation rule seed
sources.notes: Initial structure only. Interpretive outputs require review before public display.

sources.title: Drishvara palmistry interpretation rule seed
sources.notes: Knowledge reference only. Image-based palm reading is not enabled at this stage.
